params.name: Family Mug
params.description: Home is a cozy and secure haven, much like a warm cup of coffee. The rising steam and the rich aroma of coffee beautifully capture the delicate tenderness and warmth of a family. You can feel the profound affection within, as if being enveloped by a mother's embrace all around.
